TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tsakhiagiin_Elbegdorj, title = Tsakhiagiin_Elbegdorj, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tsakhiagiin_Elbegdorj} }

S.FORM: Tsakhiagiin Elbegdorj ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 3, Tsakhiagiin Elbegdorj, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Mongolia ta' misuw hya' ga Tsakhiagiin Elbegdorj, aring ryax tay 18 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Tsakhiagiin Elbegdorj ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 3, Tsakhiagiin Elbegdorj, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Mongolia ta' misuw hya' ga Tsakhiagiin Elbegdorj, aring ryax tay 18 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ts~ɕakħiaɣiin elβeɣ*orj rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, ts~ɕakħiaɣiin elβeɣ*orj, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw moŋolia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ts~ɕakħiaɣiin elβeɣ*orj, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
